description: What can publishers expect from PubDesk, The Trade Desk’s new publisher dashboard? Not world domination, according to Mike O’Sullivan, The Trade Desk’s GM of product. Since 2022, when TTD launched OpenPath, its direct-to-publisher supply connection, there’s b…
